title: ASP.NET Core Developer
responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: NovaSoft is hiring a middle asp.net core developer to support building enterprise backend systems and internal business applications.
raw_text: Vacancy V073: ASP.NET Core Developer at NovaSoft. Location: Kharkiv. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 2.0 years. Required skills: c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework, docker, microservices, xunit, rest api. Optional skills: ci/cd, gRPC. Responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow.
